ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Common name of the country */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Official name of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "population_2020" TEXT /* 2020 population estimate */,
  "gdp_nominal" TEXT /* Nominal GDP of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the population belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the population data was recorded */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country for that year */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Population growth rate for that year */,
  "urban_population" TEXT /* Urban population of the country for that year */,
  "rural_population" TEXT /* Rural population of the country for that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "area_data" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the area belongs to */,
  "area_sq_km" TEXT /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "land_area_sq_km" TEXT /* Land area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "water_area_sq_km" TEXT /* Water area of the country in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "density_data" (
  "density_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each density record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the density belongs to */,
  "density_sq_km" REAL /* Population density of the country in people per square kilometer */,
  "urban_density_sq_km" REAL /* Urban population density of the country in people per square kilometer */,
  "rural_density_sq_km" REAL /* Rural population density of the country in people per square kilometer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("density_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_density_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urbanization_data" (
  "urbanization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each urbanization record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the urbanization belongs to */,
  "urbanization_rate" REAL /* Urbanization rate of the country as a percentage */,
  "urban_population_growth_rate" REAL /* Urban population growth rate of the country */,
  "rural_population_growth_rate" REAL /* Rural population growth rate of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("urbanization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urbanization_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_projections" (
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each projection record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the projection belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the population is projected for */,
  "projected_population" TEXT /* Projected population of the country for that year */,
  "projected_urban_population" TEXT /* Projected urban population of the country for that year */,
  "projected_rural_population" TEXT /* Projected rural population of the country for that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("projection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_projections_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the region belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_regions" (
  "country_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country-region relationship */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user exporting the data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country being exported */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, JSON, PDF) */,
  "export_file_name" TEXT /* File name of the exported data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user importing the data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country being imported */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was imported */,
  "import_source" TEXT /* Source of the imported data */,
  "import_file_name" TEXT /* File name of the imported data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the API key */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for external integration */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for external integration */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the API key expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API key used for the integration */,
  "integration_name" TEXT /* Name of the integration */,
  "integration_description" TEXT /* Description of the integration */,
  "integration_url" TEXT /* URL of the integrated API */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_api_key_id FOREIGN KEY ("api_key_id") REFERENCES api_keys ("api_key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
